query:
UPDATE invoices
SET paymentMethod = 'transferencia',
    isAutomatic = 0,
    status = 'cobrada'
WHERE invoiceNumber = 'FAC-2026-0001';

SELECT id, invoiceNumber, clientName, paymentMethod, status, isAutomatic, transferProofUrl
FROM invoices
WHERE invoiceNumber = 'FAC-2026-0001';
